item.title: Dump of satisfying things to start the weekend. Be Happy !
item.description:
Last one blew up… now here’s a robot doing aerial yoga... for reasons.
the closest we ever got to achieving world peace ...
Pool scratcher.
Vintage paper cutter.
Turning a frozen lake into a working boat in Germany.
The beavers won't be very amused...
Great construction.
Cheater !
Opening a barrel of fermenting peppers, with a garlic topping.
Popcorn time the old fashioned way.
Lame.
London’s best focaccia sandwich.
He was surgical with that mango.
Bro mastered the hoverboard.
A giant perfect flan.
Zero survival skills and a mind full of curiosity.
Not the hero this city deserves, but the hero this city needs.
Tractor Powered by a Ferrari Engine.
What is this car (or truck) that warned you not to put a phone there ? This design is ridiculously stupid !
Drywall taper Taping and jointing.
This Is Why You Wear A Helmet.
Satisfying Gardening clean up.
Whatever he did wrong I hope she forgives him.
Guide dogs are on an entirely different level. He secured a seat for his human without a single command.
A Nice Tool not only for mechanics.
Japans Automated Bike Garage.
Nokia used to build very cool devices.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: Ukrainians hacked yesterday's secret meeting of the Russian Ministry of Industry and Trade on drone production.
item.description:
Never invade a country full of smart people who speak your language. "Your fucking faces have all been recorded, so gentleman, watch your backs. Yes, yes, you, the bald guy, first and foremost".
Russians cited problems in obtaining even basic components, all now being reliant on China. Russians laugh that they now have to even import copper wire and plastic.

item.title: GovBrief Today #442
item.description: Breaking: Iran reasserted control over the Strait of Hormuz overnight. Hours after Donald Trump told the world Iran had agreed to never close the Strait of Hormuz again, Iran closed it again. Trump often announces grand deals the other side never agreed to. He posted Friday that Israel is "PROHIBITED" from bombing Lebanon. Over a million Lebanese are already displaced, one in five of the country. Nobody in Jerusalem or Tehran is waiting for his permission to do anything. The Iran ceasefire expires Wednesday. Call your representatives through 5 Calls and Resistbot and demand they tell the White House to extend the ceasefire. We've emailed 7,000+ stories over 442 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Embedded links, data, images at the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260417-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/russian-oil-sanctions [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr17 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/brennan-prosecutor [4] https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-gulfstream [5] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-anthropic-meet [6] https://go.govbrief.today/fisa-extended [7] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-nexstar-halt [8] https://go.govbrief.today/irs-trump-settlement [9] https://go.govbrief.today/tx-dr-sanctions Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Mint
item.description: A federal law passed in 1866 explicitly prohibits living people from appearing on U.S. currency. It's not a grey area. It's not open to interpretation. It's been sitting in the books for over 150 years. The last time this actually happened was 1926 when a coin featuring Calvin Coolidge was minted while he was still alive and serving as president. The backlash was immediate. The coins were pulled. And the law was reaffirmed. Now this retired lawyer has filed a federal lawsuit against the U.S. Mint, not because of who is on the coin, but because the law says it simply cannot be done. Full stop. No political agenda. No protest. Just one guy, a dusty legal statute, and a federal case that apparently nobody in tRump's regime saw coming.
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: Cancer update
item.description: After around a year of fighting, they are finally going in to remove my cancer. Unfortunately, its likely going to cost me my large intestine and my bladder. The large intestine has to come out due to a genetic condition that got found during all this. The bladder got infiltrated by the cancer, so it has to at least partially go. If they take so much of my bladder, there is a chance they take it all, and give me a bag on my gut for urine. On top of that, there is a chsnce they have to take my prostate with it. There is a chance, on taking my large intestine, that they might be able to connect the small to my rectum. Doctor said chances are, im going to have two bags on my abdomen. One for poop, one for pee. I look at my future prospects, and am terrified. What job would take me, with the issues im likely to have? If they take my prostate, im not going to be much use to a woman beyond lips and fingers. As well, never really wanted kids, but there is a good chance this removes that entirely as an option. I look to the future...but see no reason to even want to survive this surgery. I don't want to die....but what is left to live for? Sorry for the depressed rant...been screaming into the void for a year....im just tired.
item.dc:creator: JustinArnold

item.title: friends from work this week
item.description:
no bath… only ball
just a chessie doing chessie things
You so majestic buddy
you’re my best bud too
s n a c k s
You did so good baby girl I’m so proud of you!!
Coworkers pup needed a trim - so much floof
Yous look pretty good buddy (I just do baths/nails/pawpad/sani trims so this is my first full shave)
My best floofy girl friend
The happiest of floofs
Baby you ridiculous
Wolf boy deshed
not amused
He makes sure I get a bath too
And the shake continues
Such a goof
So handsome
<3
Look at that face
Had to pay the snuggle tax to refill my treat pouch
.
